# EKCalendarChooserDisplayStyle.writableCalendarsOnly

**Case**

Displays writable calendars only.

## Declaration

```swift
case writableCalendarsOnly
```

## Constants

- **EKCalendarChooserDisplayStyle.allCalendars**: Displays writable and read-only calendars.
